title: neomammillaria orcuttii
intro: Neomammillaria orcuttii, also known as the Pima pup cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Neomammillaria. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Neomammillaria orcuttii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The plant's roots can be used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, which are often used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
